items.briefing:
Ransomware threats are intensifying, with AI now helping attackers move faster than ever — meaning organisations have less time to respond before damage is done. A separate alert highlights that the Inc ransomware group is actively exploiting unpatched vulnerabilities in SonicWall remote access devices, which are commonly used in Australian workplaces. If your organisation uses SonicWall SMA equipment, ensure firmware updates are applied immediately.

A recent study also found that 79% of organisations have experienced security incidents caused by known, unpatched vulnerabilities — a reminder that keeping software up to date remains one of the most effective defences available.

**Tip:** Check with your IT team this week to confirm all critical software and network devices are fully patched and up to date.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: 81% of Australian organisations already hit by AI security incidents, showing urgent need for AI security strategy.
